title: Settings
helper_email: Email cannot be changed. Contact support if needed.
helper_language: This affects the quotes you see by default and your submissions.
desc_public_profile: Allow others to see your profile and public collections.
desc_show_attribution: Display your name as the submitter on approved quotes.
helper_theme: Choose your preferred theme for the application.
desc_show_home_title: Show the big "VERBATIMS" title on the home page.
desc_quote_approval: Get notified when your submitted quotes are approved or rejected.
desc_collection_updates: Get notified when someone adds quotes to your public collections.
desc_weekly_digest: Receive a weekly summary of new quotes and activity.
desc_delete_account: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
dialog_delete_body: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This will permanently remove:
dialog_delete_item_quotes: All your submitted quotes (drafts, pending, and published)
